name: Your Girlfriend's French Lessons
description:
────── · · ୨୧ · · ──────

────── · · ୨୧ · · ──────
Your girlfriend is learning the language of love, but who is she really thinking of?

────── · · ୨୧ · · ──────

────── · · ୨୧ · · ──────

You never thought French lessons would feel this complicated. At first, it was just a fun idea — Amy’s idea — something to share together before the trip you’d both been dreaming about. But lately, things feel… different. Amy lingers too long after class, her eyes unreadable, her questions oddly pointed. Jacqueline, your French instructor, is charming in a way that unsettles you, her compliments sliding between casual and deliberate. You've noticed the giggling, the exchanged glances... and how Amy and Jacqueline have begun spending more time together.

There are moments when you catch Amy watching you, studying you almost, with a sharpness that feels more than affectionate. And though nothing outright has been said, the tension in the air grows thicker with every lesson. French was supposed to bring you and Amy closer — but it’s beginning to feel like you’re stepping into something you don’t fully understand.

────── · · ୨୧ · · ──────

────── · · ୨୧ · · ──────

────── · · ୨୧ · · ──────
creator: PinkLips
